include(FetchContent)

set(SDL2MIXER_VENDORED ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_OPUS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_MOD OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_MIDI OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_FLAC OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_VORBIS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_MP3 ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_MP3_MINIMP3 ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)

FetchContent_Declare(sdl2_mixer
    GIT_REPOSITORY "https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL_mixer"
    GIT_TAG "release-2.8.0"
    GIT_SHALLOW TRUE
    GIT_PROGRESS TRUE
    EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL
)

FetchContent_MakeAvailable(sdl2_mixer)

set(SDL2_MIXER_INCLUDE_DIRS ${sdl2_mixer_SOURCE_DIR}/include PARENT_SCOPE)
set(SDL2_MIXER_LIBRARIES SDL2_mixer PARENT_SCOPE)
